page.content:
In the Property disposition activity, the Yearly Overview indicates that for 2020, the Property Type was Industrial with Units Disposed at 15, Total Dispositions amounting to CHF45M, Average Unit Price at CHF3M, Disposition Volume by Year of 60, Average Days on Market at 15. In 2021, the Property Type was Office with Units Disposed at 20, Total Dispositions of CHF50M, Average Unit Price at CHF2.5M, Disposition Volume of 70, and Average Days on Market at 15. For 2022, the Property Type was Retail with 10 Units Disposed, Total Dispositions of CHF30M, Average Unit Price at CHF3M, Disposition Volume at 75, and Average Days on Market at 12. In 2023, the Property Type was Data Center with 25 Units Disposed, Total Dispositions of CHF70M, Average Unit Price at CHF2.8M, Disposition Volume of 90, and Average Days on Market at 10. For 2024, the Property Type was Mixed-Use with 5 Units Disposed, Total Dispositions of CHF20M, Average Unit Price at CHF4M, Disposition Volume at 90, and Average Days on Market at 10, leading to a Total of 75 Units Disposed and CHF215M in Total Dispositions with an Average Unit Price of CHF2.8M and Average Days on Market at 70.

In the Lease expiry schedule, for 2019, Total Leases were 150 with 30 Expiring Leases, a Renewal Rate of 85%, Average Lease Term of 5 years, and Occupancy Rate of 95%.

page.content: In 2020, there were 160 Total Leases with 25 Expiring Leases, a 90% Renewal Rate, an Average Lease Term of 6 years, and an Occupancy Rate of 94%. In 2021, Total Leases were 170 with 35 Expiring Leases, an 80% Renewal Rate, an Average Lease Term of 5 years, and an Occupancy Rate of 92%.

page.content: For 2022, Total Leases were 180 with 40 Expiring Leases, a 75% Renewal Rate, an Average Lease Term of 4 years, and an Occupancy Rate of 91%. In 2023, Total Leases were 190 with 45 Expiring Leases, a Renewal Rate of 78%, an Average Lease Term of 5 years, and an Occupancy Rate of 90%. For 2024, Total Leases were 200 with 50 Expiring Leases, an 82% Renewal Rate, an Average Lease Term of 4 years, and an Occupancy Rate of 89%, summing to a Total of 1050 Leases, 225 Expiring Leases, an 82% Renewal Rate, an Average Lease Term of 5 years, and a 91% Occupancy Rate. The Average Rent was CHF30/sqm, with Total Revenue at CHF50M and Net Income of CHF20M.
